//fabrik:cli:command functions become shell commands: the name derives from
the function, the help from the doc comment, and the wrapper builds exactly
the command's dependencies when it is selected.
-- go.mod --
module app

go 1.26

require github.com/gofabrik/fabrik/cli v0.1.0

replace github.com/gofabrik/fabrik/cli => CLIDIR
-- main.go --
package main

import "os"

func main() { os.Exit(run()) }
-- shared/shared.go --
package shared

import "github.com/gofabrik/fabrik/cli"

type Greeter struct{}

//fabrik:provider
func NewGreeter() *Greeter { return &Greeter{} }

// Greet someone.
//
//fabrik:cli:command
func Greet(ctx cli.Context, g *Greeter) error {
	return nil
}

// Print the version.
//
//fabrik:cli:command
func Version(ctx cli.Context) error {
	return nil
}
-- want/main.gen.go --
// Code generated by fabrik. DO NOT EDIT.
// Regenerate with: fabrik wire

package main

import (
	"context"
	"os"
	"os/signal"
	"syscall"

	"github.com/gofabrik/fabrik/cli"

	"app/shared"
)

func run() int {
	ctx, cancel := context.WithCancel(context.Background())
	defer cancel()
	sigc := make(chan os.Signal, 2)
	signal.Notify(sigc, os.Interrupt, syscall.SIGTERM)
	defer signal.Stop(sigc)
	go func() {
		<-sigc
		cancel()
		<-sigc
		os.Exit(1)
	}()

	root := &cli.Command{
		Name: "app",
		Subcommands: []*cli.Command{
			{
				Name: "greet",
				Help: "Greet someone",
				Run: func(ctx cli.Context) error {
					greeter, err := buildGreet(ctx)
					if err != nil {
						return err
					}
					return shared.Greet(ctx, greeter)
				},
			},
			{
				Name: "version",
				Help: "Print the version",
				Run: func(ctx cli.Context) error {
					return shared.Version(ctx)
				},
			},
		},
	}
	return root.Exec(os.Args[1:], cli.WithSignalContext(ctx))
}

func buildGreet(ctx context.Context) (*shared.Greeter, error) {
	// Providers
	sharedGreeter := shared.NewGreeter()
	return sharedGreeter, nil
}
